d:
Pang enters a meditative state, focusing his chi before unleashing a powerful burst at the end of the meditation. The burst deals [[350%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within [[2]] tiles. He then enters the Unyielding Force stance, which drains [[150]] Energy per second while active. Pang remains [[unaffected]] while casting this skill. 
In Unyielding Force stance, Pang increases his Haste by [[60]] and ATK by [[17%]], and unlocks Skybreach Strikes.
Skybreach Strikes: Pang charges his strength, strikes an enemy [[7]] times with alternating palm attacks. Each strike deals [[70%]]<ATK> damage. The final strike deals [[150%]]<ATK> damage and stuns the enemy for [[1.5]]s. When hitting a non-boss enemy, the final strike also prevents Energy recovery for [[5]]s.
Increases the chi burst damage to [[380%]]<ATK>, and the ATK bonus granted by Unyielding Force to [[19%]].
Increases the chi burst damage to [[410%]]<ATK>, and the ATK bonus granted by Unyielding Force to [[21%]].
Increases the chi burst damage to [[440%]]<ATK>, and the ATK bonus granted by Unyielding Force to [[23%]].
Increases the chi burst damage to [[470%]]<ATK>, and the ATK bonus granted by Unyielding Force to [[25%]].

Pang strikes an enemy on the head, dealing [[300%]]<ATK> damage. If he is in Unyielding Force stance, this strike deals extra damage equal to [[12%]] of the enemy's current HP. The extra damage cannot exceed [[240%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[320%]]<ATK>, and the extra damage dealt in Unyielding Force stance to [[13%]] of the enemy's current HP. The extra damage cannot exceed [[260%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[340%]]<ATK>, and the extra damage dealt in Unyielding Force stance to [[14%]] of the enemy's current HP. The extra damage cannot exceed [[280%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[360%]]<ATK>, and the extra damage dealt in Unyielding Force stance to [[15%]] of the enemy's current HP. The extra damage cannot exceed [[300%]]<ATK>.

Active. Pang channels his chi, gaining a [[340%]]<ATK> Chi Barrier for [[9]]s. While the barrier is active, Pang remains [[unaffected]].
When the barrier expires, breaks, or is reapplied, it transforms into razor leaves that deal [[210%]]<ATK> damage to Pang's current target. Pang is also unaffected while channeling his chi.
Increases the Chi Barrier's shield value to [[380%]]<ATK> and the razor leaves damage to [[230%]]<ATK>.
Increases the Chi Barrier's shield value to [[420%]]<ATK> and the razor leaves damage to [[250%]]<ATK>.
Increases the Chi Barrier's shield value to [[460%]]<ATK> and the razor leaves damage to [[270%]]<ATK>.
Pang increases his ATK by [[9%]] during battle. He further increases his ATK by an extra [[6%]] while in Unyielding Force stance.
Pang increases his ATK by [[12%]] during battle. He further increases his ATK by an extra [[8%]] while in Unyielding Force stance.
Pang increases his ATK by [[15%]] during battle. He further increases his ATK by an extra [[10%]] while in Unyielding Force stance.
Pang increases the ATK of any unit shielded by his Chi Barrier by [[15%]].
Pang increases the ATK of any unit shielded by his Chi Barrier by [[17%]].

Pang draws on the chi around him to protect an ally. When an allied hero (other than Pang) reaches [[850]] Energy or higher, Pang grants them a Chi Barrier. He can only shield the same ally once every [[15]]s.
Pang increases the ATK of any unit shielded by his Chi Barrier by [[19%]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Healing, 10 Haste.

d: Pang immediately gains a Chi Barrier upon entering the Unyielding Force stance. While in this stance, he gains [[30]] DEF Penetration.
